import os, requests, time, json, random
api=os.environ['API_URL']
acct='acct-1'
# get initial
r=requests.get(api+'/balance', params={'account':acct}, timeout=2); print('initial', r.text.strip())
old=None
bad=0
for i in range(50):
    d=requests.post(api+'/deposit', json={'account':acct,'amount_cents':1}, timeout=2)
    if d.status_code!=200:
        print('deposit fail',d.status_code,d.text); break
    dj=d.json(); expected=dj['balance_cents']
    g=requests.get(api+'/balance', params={'account':acct}, timeout=2)
    if g.status_code!=200:
        print('get fail',g.status_code,g.text); continue
    gj=g.json()
    if gj['balance_cents']<expected:
        bad+=1
        print('BAD',i,'dep',dj,'get',gj)
    elif i<5:
        print('ok',i,dj,gj)
print('bad',bad)
